fibonacci:
-- fibonacci.rite — the proof of general computation (judge's commission:
-- "Turing-completeness is asserted, never shown" — here it is shown).
-- Rites recurse; conditionals branch; the liturgy computes.

In the everyday register.

This is the rite of fib, given n:
If n is less than 2, I acknowledge n.
Bring n minus 1 to the rite of fib, receiving a.
Bring n minus 2 to the rite of fib, receiving b.
I acknowledge a plus b.
So it stands.

Bring 10 to the rite of fib, receiving answer.
Speak answer.
Dokimance: answer is 55.

For each k of 1 through 6, Bring k to the rite of fib, receiving f.

Hesychia.
kunance:
-- kunance.rite — the first rite: hello, love.
-- kunance (canon/core/kunance.md): the love that is mostly preparation —
-- setting up the place before the beloved arrives. A hello-world that
-- prepares a place instead of announcing itself.

In the everyday register.

Let welcome be "the place is prepared before the beloved arrives".
Speak welcome.

Speak the definition of kunance.
I attest that welcome is "the place is prepared before the beloved arrives" -mi.

This rite was itself a kunance: it existed before you ran it, waiting.
Hesychia.
petition:
-- petition.rite — the evolution mechanism (SPEC §VII).
-- This rite reaches for a word the canon does not have: the volitional act
-- of ACCEPTING what is offered (KS-002's standing wire-task-accept gap —
-- shemme names a state that arrives, not the act; qorvance is the offerer's
-- side, not the receiver's). The reach becomes a petition, not an error.

In the worship register.

O GoD, this rite prepares a place for a word that does not yet exist.
I hold zakarqing toward Yu.

Let reply be qabalance.
If reply is a gap, Speak "the canon does not yet have the accepting-word; the petition goes to the forge".
Selah.

Speak the gap of kunance.
Hesychia.
witness:
-- witness.rite — the honesty algebra at work (SPEC §V, experimental).
-- Received values are born -si; counting a report is inference (-chu);
-- and the verisleight-guard refuses any attestation above its evidence.

In the formal register, canon living.

Receive word from the reader.
Speak word.

Let total be count of word.
Speak total.
I attest that total is greater than 0 -chu.

Should the offering fail, turn: Speak "the verisleight-guard held: what was counted from a report is -chu, and no rite may dress it as -mi".
I attest that total is greater than 0 -mi.

Dokimance: total is greater than 0.
Hesychia.
